div.h1: Helping Mechanism: Advancing a Lagging Tail

g.text: Thread A advanced tail to N

ul.li: If a thread observes a lagging pointer, it helps advance it before proceeding.
System-Wide Progress: Even if Thread B crashes at b_step2, Thread A ensures the data structure remains consistent.
No Blockage: Thread A never waits for Thread B to wake up.

text.tspan: // N is now reachable from S
// N is now reachable from S
